read: The profiled HSK BF16 source-fed TileLang producer dispatches four times at ~5.12 ms each, matching benchmark timing. The remaining sparse-attention kernel branch should optimize this TileLang body and remove route planning/materialized bridge costs; the profiler also confirms a separate PyTorch scatter/gather route-planning bucket around 4.38 ms average per call in the full benchmark process.
next: Run counter collection or omniperf on the HSK BF16 kernel only after either forcing TileLang arch under profiler or reusing the same prewarm-cache method with kernel include filters. Prioritize reducing final global atomics/local accumulation in mfma_panel_atomic_final_limited_bshd_source_hsk_bf16_scaled_prim_kernel, and remove 10 ms warmed dynamic route planning from the integrated TorchTitan path.
